description: You are a licensed land surveyor at a survey firm in Clear Creek County, Colorado. Produce a topographic plan deliverable for a grading permit application using TopoCal. Utilizing the survey data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ClearCreekProject\clearcreek_survey.csv and the requirements in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ClearCreekProject\PlanSpec.txt, create a terrain model that includes contour lines and a longitudinal profile. Export the completed plan to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ClearCreekProject\ClearCreek_TopoMap.dxf, ensuring all elements (survey points, contour polylines, and profile geometry) are on the layers specified in PlanSpec.txt. Additionally, save the TopoCal project file to C:\Users\

metadata.anti_gaming_note: Max partial credit = 44 (12+12+10+10) which is below pass threshold 60
